prompt: Side-profile silhouette comparison of the four major keycap profiles (Cherry, OEM, SA, MT3) stacked horizontally in a row on a warm-paper field — a single stroke study reading left-to-right as ascending height with characteristic top shapes (Cherry low + subtle dome, OEM a notch taller with a touch more dome, SA tall + spherical, MT3 tall + deeply scooped dish + angular sides).
